meta.source: references/jeolgi/{YYYY}.json imported from reference generation and validated for v0.7 runtime cache
meta.skyfield_de421_coverage: 1950-1999, 2028-2030, plus corrected replacements/repairs noted per entry
meta.skyfield_method_note: Use ecliptic_latlon('date'), not J2000, to avoid ~8 hour error.
correction_history: 2011-01-21 대한: KASI 1-day typo replaced by skyfield result 2011-01-20 19:18
2011-11-08 입동: KASI vs skyfield 6h difference, replaced by skyfield 2011-11-08 03:34
2015 하지: review_note only, KASI kept despite 20m difference from skyfield
2000 입춘/우수: reference generation reference had 23 entries; v0.7 repaired missing 우수 and true 입춘 using solar longitude fallback
meta.validation: KASI ground truth 615 comparisons; 612/615 within 1 minute (99.5%) as supplied by reference generation methodology.

2000.name: 입춘
2000.correction_note: reference generation reference had 2000 입춘 mislabeled at 2000-02-19 and missing 우수; repaired by solar longitude fallback.

2000.name: 우수
2000.fixed_note: reference generation reference had this entry labeled 입춘/315°; date/time corresponds to 우수/330°.
